input.headline: Artificial intelligence sparks debate at COP30 climate talks in Brazil

raw.headline: Artificial intelligence sparks debate at COP30 climate talks in Brazil

winner: AI showed up at COP30 and was like, 'I’ve got 28 climate solutions ready... *proceeds to recommend more deforestation*.

candidates.text: Why did the AI bring a ladder to COP30? Because it wanted to *raise the bar* on climate change—it's already too low!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'raise the bar' and climate change, concise and specific to the headline."}

candidates.text: The AI said it would solve climate change, then started printing "42" on every continent—turns out, it just really likes *The Hitchhiker's Guide*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific reference to '42' and *The Hitchhiker's Guide*, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: What if AI proposes a climate solution so brilliant, it’s actually just a spreadsheet titled "Why Are Trees So Bad at Carbon Capture?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Surprising twist with AI proposing a spreadsheet as a solution, specific to the context of COP30 and climate talks, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: AI showed up at COP30 and was like, 'I’ve got 28 climate solutions ready... *proceeds to recommend more deforestation*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the punchline feels a bit forced and slightly offensive due to the mention of deforestation in a negative light."}

candidates.text: Why did the AI refuse to attend COP30? It said it couldn't commit to any long-term relationships—its neural networks were too short-term!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'long-term relationships' and 'neural networks,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity to the context of COP30 or AI in climate talks."}
